title: Connector Release
description: A versioned, certified release of a HELM connector, capturing executor kind, schema bindings, sandbox policy, certification proof, and cryptographic identity.

version.description: Semver version string for this release.

state.description: Lifecycle state of this connector release.

executor_kind.description: Execution model used to run this connector.

schema_refs.description: References to JSON schema files that define this connector's input/output contracts.

sandbox_profile.description: Reference to the sandbox policy profile applied during connector execution.

drift_policy_ref.description: Reference to the drift detection policy for this connector.

certification_ref.description: Reference to the certification receipt issued after conformance testing.

binary_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the connector binary or container image digest.

signature_ref.description: Reference to the cryptographic signature over this release manifest.
